rows.notes: [predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Materialize the DARTS-confirmed time-traveler configuration (25K params, 30 B/pair, 4x4 foveation, hidden 32, int8) as the highest-EV follow-on packet candidate. promotion_gate=DARTS config materialized + TT5L archive roundtrip + paired [contest-CUDA]/[contest-CPU] exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Encode a small ego-motion world model once, then transmit only per-pair prediction errors under a cooperative-receiver loss. promotion_gate=TT5L archive roundtrip + macOS advisory smoke + paired exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Exploit SegNet argmax-stable interiors by charging boundary RGB and reconstructing interiors from class means plus tiny refinement. promotion_gate=SBO1 archive custody + scorer-free inflate + paired exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Use high-frequency regions attenuated by the scorer stems as a charged side-information channel for useful residual bytes. promotion_gate=S2S1 archive custody + byte-consumption proof + paired exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Pre-train a sub-100K dashcam renderer on public driving video distributions, then fine-tune only contest residuals using the fixed scorer as cooperative receiver and penultimate-feature saliency as the allocation signal. promotion_gate=dataset/license manifest + scorer penultimate-hook readiness + deterministic renderer export + paired [contest-CUDA]/[contest-CPU] exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Exercise the DPW1 charged world-model archive grammar now: a small deterministic driving prior plus residual grid that can later absorb a trained public-driving prior without changing inflate semantics. promotion_gate=DPW1 byte-consumption proof + trained prior export + paired [contest-CUDA]/[contest-CPU] exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Build a Coord-MLP residual basis as an HNeRV-external PR103-on-PR106 sidecar: small, reviewable, and directly aimed at the current frontier without another family-internal retrain. promotion_gate=sidecar bytes changed and consumed + full-frame parity baseline + paired [contest-CUDA]/[contest-CPU] exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Apply Donoho-Johnstone universal thresholding to HNeRV-family decoder weights in a wavelet basis before entropy coding. promotion_gate=state_dict_parity + full-frame inflate parity + paired exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Pose targets may be temporally smooth enough that sparse FFT/SAR-style coherent coding beats per-pair independent pose side information. promotion_gate=spectral concentration smoke + pose codec roundtrip + paired exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] A deterministic video-derived seed can specialize latent/codebook indices to this exact video without storing a generic codebook. promotion_gate=deterministic codebook regeneration + archive-byte reduction + exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] SegMap signal should be encoded in whitened scorer eigenmodes, dropping low-power modes under the Atick-Redlich power constraint. promotion_gate=basis custody + decoded mask/pose coupling proof + paired exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] A fixed wavelet-scattering decoder may replace learned decoder bytes, moving archive budget from weights into pair-specific latents. promotion_gate=trainer + archive grammar + runtime dependency closure + paired exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Compose A1's rate-frontier renderer with LAPose foveal RGB residuals so bytes target the pose-axis marginal regime instead of another HNeRV-family internal retrain. promotion_gate=sidecar byte-consumption proof + predicted packet below 0.19 target + paired [contest-CUDA]/[contest-CPU] exact eval

[predicted; cooperative-receiver planning-only] Retarget A1+wavelet away from generic byte shaving and toward score-sensitive edge/detail bands selected by xray/saliency probes. promotion_gate=score-sensitive wavelet atom selection + packet predicted below 0.19 + paired [contest-CUDA]/[contest-CPU] exact eval

continual_learning_hook.reason: campaign queue rows are predictions/proxy planning artifacts

entries.description: Water-fill bit allocation + static-histogram arithmetic terminal on block-FP-eligible conv weights. Pre-archive renderer payload.
entries.name: Lane Ω-W-V2

entries.description: Sensitivity-weighted renderer archive: high-sensitivity Conv2d output channels stay FP16 while the remaining channels pass through OWV2 water-fill + arithmetic coding. Sensitivity is compress-time only; decode is pure byte-to-tensor math.
entries.name: Lane Ω-W-V3

entries.description: Iterative-magnitude-pruning sparse-CSR archive — Conv2d weights at >=78%% sparsity pass through the per-tensor sparse-CSR codec (uint16 idx + FP4 val); ineligible / low-sparsity / large-numel tensors fall back to FP16.
entries.name: Lane 17 IMP

rows.selection_policy: planning-only; rankable, non-proxy, byte-closed Pareto frontier rows sort lexicographically before pure expected-score deltas; information gain is a deterministic tie-breaker; penalties are diagnostic only
